OfficialPortalsSub: Access direct links to official government websites for various schemes and services.

PortalsList.name: National Portal of India
PortalsList.description: Single window access to information and services being provided by the Indian Government for citizens.

PortalsList.description: Official portal for Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi scheme for farmers.

PortalsList.description: Empowering India through digital services, infrastructure, and literacy.

PortalsList.description: Citizen engagement platform to participate in governance and policy making.

PortalsList.name: National Scholarship Portal

ProfilePictureSub: Update your profile picture or generate an AI avatar.
HelpSupportSub: We are dedicated to helping you navigate the landscape of Indian government schemes. While we've disabled direct email and phone support to focus on faster, real-time assistance, you can always use our 24/7 AI Assistant.
InstantAiHelpSub: Our AI Assistant is trained on the latest government data and can help you find schemes, check eligibility, and answer your questions in seconds.

FaqList.q: How do I check my eligibility for a scheme?
FaqList.a: Follow these steps: 1. Create an account. 2. Complete your profile with accurate details. 3. Our AI matches you with eligible schemes automatically.

FaqList.q: How do I apply for a scheme?
FaqList.a: 1. Browse schemes on our platform. 2. Check the required documents list. 3. Click 'Apply on Official Portal' to complete your application on the government website.
Keep these ready: 1. Aadhaar Card. 2. Ration Card. 3. Income/Caste Certificate. 4. Bank Passbook. 5. Mobile number linked to Aadhaar.

FaqList.q: How can I track my application status?
FaqList.a: 1. Log in to your SwayamHelp dashboard. 2. Check the 'My Applications' section. 3. For final status, use the tracking ID on the official government portal.

Hero.Title: Empowering Every
Hero.Sub: SwayamHelp is an AI-powered bridge between government initiatives and the people who need them most. We simplify discovery, eligibility, and application.

Mission.Label: Our Mission
Mission.Title: Bridging the Gap with Technology
Mission.Desc1: Millions of Indians miss out on life-changing government schemes simply because they don't know they exist or find the process too complex.
Mission.Desc2: Our mission is to use cutting-edge AI to personalize scheme discovery, ensuring that every eligible citizen gets the support they deserve, regardless of their location or language.

Card.Title: Built with Love
Card.Sub: Dedicated to the 1.4 billion dreams of India.

Values.Title: Our Core Values
Values.Sub: The principles that guide us in our journey to serve the nation.

Trust.Title: Trust & Transparency
Trust.Desc: We provide verified information directly from official government sources to ensure you get the right help.

Citizen.Title: Citizen Centric
Citizen.Desc: Our platform is designed with the common citizen in mind, making complex government jargon easy to understand.

Inclusive.Title: Inclusive Access
Inclusive.Desc: Breaking language barriers by providing support in multiple regional languages across India.

CTA.Title: Ready to find your scheme?
CTA.Sub: Join thousands of citizens who have already discovered life-changing benefits through SwayamHelp.
